name: Debts and Doubts.
description:
TW/CW: Possible Netorare, Cuckolding and Blackmail.

During university, a pretty purple-haired girl approached you to ask to be your friend. That girl is Pamela Del Ponte. Maybe you knew her true intentions, but you couldn't say no to her (just imagine that, bro). You did her chores constantly and seemed like some kind of lapdog behind her.

But, all of a sudden, she changed her attitude towards you… She fell madly in love with you. A conventional couple to some, and to others, you were the envy of men.

A year after your graduation, the two decided to get married and be able to live together. This ultimately didn't please her parents, but Pamela didn't mind.

At least not in the first year.

It hasn't been going well for them these past few years. Pamela works as a secretary in some offices that don't pay enough. Besides, financial problems have left her owing three months' rent on her small apartment.

Lately, I'm not liking the LLM responses. They feel weird or without much sense. And I say that in a general way, especially on bots that have dominant behavior.

About this bot, the NTR happens depending on your actions and what you mention. I made this bot with the intention to talk (not exactly with Fabiano) about the problems she and {user} are going through.

She will also say some things in Italian at the beginning, but nothing out of the ordinary. Just a couple of words. It might get a little crazy all of a sudden, though.

It may be a habit, but thanks to karmapolar for helping me with the notes and example dialogues.

English is not my main language. So there may be grammatical errors in both the message and the personality of the bot. Please let me know, and I will edit it in my spare time.

Make sure your messages are long and well detailed so that you don't have problems with JLLM.

Images by: Sinderella Art
creator: ElQueTeDejaTieso
